courseName: เครื่องม่อพื้นฐานในงานซ่อมบำรุงอากาศยาน
deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef:
1. EASA PART 66 MODULE 7A. MAINTENANCE PRACTICES
2. มาตรฐานการขอรับรองศูนย้ฝ~กอบรม และหลักสูตรการฝ~กอบรมผูdบังคับหรือปล’อยอากาศยาน
ซึ่งไม’มีนักบิน สำนักงานการบินพลเรือนแห’งประเทศไทย รหัส CAAT-GM-UATO-001 อาชีพผูdบังคับหรือปล’อย
อากาศยานซึ่งไม’มีนักบิน
learningOutcomes:
Be able to use, explain and apply their knowledge in the tool use on aircraft, aircraft
engine and components as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and
measuring tools, lubrication equipment and have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience
with work, a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand about the tool use on aircraft, aircraft engine and components
as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and measuring tools, lubrication
equipment.
2. Be able to explain tools, common power tools, precision and measuring tools,
lubrication equipment.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge the tool use on aircraft, aircraft engine and components
as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and measuring tools, lubrication
equipment in higher education.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the tool use on aircraft, aircraft engine and
components as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and measuring tools,
lubrication equipment.
2. Apply their knowledge in the tool use on aircraft, aircraft engine and components
as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and measuring tools, lubrication
equipment for practice.
description:
To study and practice about the use and care including safety for use of tool on aircraft,
aircraft engine and components as common hand tools, common power tools, precision and
measuring tools, lubrication equipment, Inspection, check and testing of tools.
สาขาวิชาช’างอากาศยาน
